title: TNF-Vanilla
body:
![TNF-Vanilla_Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ohwb2cTF/images/73d6750a35988808d4ddabb7a28cb3a8cd62d3f8.png) ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/Ohwb2cTF?label=Downloads&logo=modrinth&style=flat-square) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/607123183249653770?label=Discord&logo=discord&style=flat-square)](https://discord.gg/Yj9WH3P8RN)

About Modpack

  • High Performance
    Increase single and multiplayer performance by using Sodium mods and other optimization mods
  • QOL
    Include mods like JourneyMap, Jade 🔍, Better Statistics Screen, several Masa's popular mods to make things a lot easier
  • In-game Resource/Shader packs Download + Install
    Achieve these by using the Resourcify mod, it can also download and install data packs

Recommended JVM Arguments

    Java >= 23

    -Xms4G -Xmx4G -XX:+UseZGC

    Java 21

    -Xms4G -Xmx4G -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational
